description: You are a Document Management Specialist setting up a secure folder for the HR department in Nuxeo Platform. Using the Nuxeo Web UI as Administrator, navigate to the Projects workspace (/default-domain/workspaces/Projects) and create a Folder titled "Confidential HR Documents" with the description "Restricted folder for HR department confidential documents". Configure the folder to block permission inheritance, granting user 'jsmith' Read & Write access and the group 'members' Read access. Within this folder, create a Note document titled "Employee Policy Update" containing text regarding the company's updated remote work policy.
